name: github-pr-auth-breaking-change
title: Rotate token signing to ES256 and drop the legacy /v1/verify endpoint
body:
Moves auth-service token signing from HS256 to ES256 and removes the deprecated `/v1/verify` endpoint. Downstream services that validate tokens (api-gateway, billing-api) must upgrade to the auth-client >= 3.0 SDK first; older clients will reject ES256 tokens.

This is a BREAKING CHANGE: do not deploy auth-service until all consumers are on auth-client 3.0, or token validation across the fleet will fail. Coordinate a staged rollout with the platform team.
